universal.label: Universal Constraints
universal.description: Global hard constraints enforced across all three locations — barre mix targets, Sunday rules, consecutive-class limits, and daily capacity caps.

format_rules.label: Class Format Rules
format_rules.description: Per-format scheduling guidance: eligible locations, preferred days/slots, weekly min/max counts, certified-trainer requirements, and mix targets.

location_kwality.label: Kwality House Rules
location_kwality.description: Rules specific to Kwality House, Kemps Corner — Strength Lab exclusivity, PowerCycle minimums, and peak-slot ownership.

location_supreme.label: Supreme HQ Rules
location_supreme.description: Rules specific to Supreme HQ, Bandra — daily PowerCycle requirements, Recovery placement, and class-mix guardrails.

location_kenkere.label: Kenkere House Rules
location_kenkere.description: Rules specific to Kenkere House — PowerCycle ban, Barre-family minimums, and trainer ownership blocks.

trainer_specific.label: Strict Trainer Day Locks
trainer_specific.description: Enforce trainer availability windows as hard constraints. When OFF, availability is treated as a scheduling preference and the AI may deviate for performance reasons.

UNIV-001.description: Barre 57 family must be >= 25% of total weekly classes at any location
UNIV-001.title: UNIV-001

UNIV-002.description: All 3 time bands must have >= 1 class every weekday
UNIV-002.title: UNIV-002

UNIV-006.description: Express class must be paired with full-length equivalent on same day
UNIV-006.title: UNIV-006

UNIV-007.description: Studio Recovery must never be first class of day
UNIV-007.title: UNIV-007

UNIV-009.description: No trainer > 3 consecutive classes without 5 min gap
UNIV-009.title: UNIV-009

UNIV-010.description: No trainer > 4 classes in one day
UNIV-010.title: UNIV-010

UNIV-012.description: Strength Lab ONLY at Kwality House
UNIV-012.title: UNIV-012

UNIV-013.description: Pre/Post Natal NEVER at ANY LOCATION
UNIV-013.title: UNIV-013

UNIV-014.description: Peak midday slot must never be empty
UNIV-014.title: UNIV-014

UNIV-015.description: Always schedule >= 1 Barre 57 before 10:00 AM every day
UNIV-015.title: UNIV-015

UNIV-016.description: Always schedule Barre 57 or Cardio Barre 19:00-19:30 weekdays
UNIV-016.title: UNIV-016

UNIV-017.description: Always assign Tier 1 trainer to primary peak slot
UNIV-017.title: UNIV-017

UNIV-019.description: Specialist classes no substitution with non-certified
UNIV-019.title: UNIV-019

UNIV-020.description: Never roster trainer at location with < 30 historical sessions
UNIV-020.title: UNIV-020

UNIV-021.description: Never schedule banned class formats: SWEAT In 30, Dance Recovery, Pre/Post Natal, Hosted Class, Foundations
UNIV-021.title: UNIV-021

UNIV-022.description: A trainer cannot be scheduled across 2 locations in the same shift
UNIV-022.title: UNIV-022

UNIV-023.description: Same class formats must not be scheduled consecutively
UNIV-023.title: UNIV-023

UNIV-024.description: No classes before 07:00, between 13:00-15:00, or after 20:30
UNIV-024.title: UNIV-024

UNIV-025.description: Every trainer must get at least 1 full day off each week; 2 is preferred
UNIV-025.title: UNIV-025

UNIV-026.description: Recovery sessions must be the last class in their shift at that location
UNIV-026.title: UNIV-026
